label: service (delivery of legal process)
pattern: InstanceSchema; event + person-to-person DO with TOUCH and SAY
gloss: The formal act of delivering a writ or summons to the person named in it, thereby giving that person official notice of legal proceedings and any response required of them.
notes: AST adequacy: lossy — The rendering captures an agent's action bringing a thing into touch with its recipient and conveying it as notice, but cannot represent that the thing is a writ or summons whose delivery has formal legal force.
